violations.text: Raw animal foods (shell eggs) were observed stored above/beside ready-to-eat foods in the small refrigerator and dairy/sandwich slide cold hold. Raw animal foods must be separated from (below) raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Thermometer is lacking in the dairy/sandwich slide cold hold. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Raw animal foods (shell eggs) were observed stored above/beside ready-to-eat TCS foods in the slide cold hold refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
